scope: Stonewake Vale HTTP polling compatibility and future push/delta handoff
cleanRoom: AmandaCore-owned snapshot, delta, cursor, and acknowledgement contract.

fields.stateVersion: uint64 monotonic when authoritative state changes
fields.tick: uint64 loop tick at frame emission

replicationFrame.delta: optional delta from a prior cursor

compatibility: Existing clients may ignore all replication fields.
GET /v1/world/state accepts optional since=<cursor> for delta metadata.
When a cursor is missing, invalid, too new, or outside retention, the server emits or requires a full snapshot.
